5:
Adalberta is troubled to learn that Wide Gulley turned an already difficult task into a contest. Upon hearing that you <Emphasis>bested</Emphasis> him, however, her dismay swiftly gives way to astonishment. She proceeds to lavish you with praise, even confessing to a hint of envy, and encourages you to continue exceeding expectations.

※The next miner quest will be available from Adalberta upon reaching level 35.

63:
So, to make this more interestin', I'll give as long as you want.
...For all the good it'll do you.
